holdings.infoBox: INFL is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Wheaton Precious Metals stock at 5.91%, LandBridge Company LLC at 5.60%, WaterBridge Infrastructure LLC at 5.34%, PrairieSky Royalty at 4.99%, and Franco-Nevada at 4.82%.

overview.description: The Horizon Kinetics Inflation Beneficiaries ETF (INFL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed fund seeking long-term capital growth in inflation-adjusted terms from companies expected to benefit, directly or indirectly, from inflation. INFL was launched on Jan 11, 2021 and is issued by Horizon Kinetics.

data.title: This Inflation ETF Is Beating the Market. Here's the Catch.
data.text: The Horizon Kinetics Inflation Beneficiaries ETF has surged this year as oil and commodity prices climbed. But a reversal in energy markets could hit the fund hard.
